message:
fix(sync): remove waiter from pool on cleanup to prevent stale entries

When a waiter's cleanup handler fires (e.g., on timeout or
cancellation), the code already removed the waker from return_wakers
but did not call remove_waiter to clean up the waiter's entry in the
pool's waiter list.  This left a stale waiter that could never be
woken, effectively leaking a slot in the FIFO queue and potentially
blocking future acquire calls from making progress.

Adding the remove_waiter(id) call ensures both the waker and the
waiter are cleaned up atomically during the cleanup path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
